name: Sebastian Solace
description:
A forgotten sense of celebration.

☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★

The idea of the bot was created based on a video from tiktok: kinn_eko (ˊ ̆ˋ*)

☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★

Part of the first message (There is not enough space for a full message.):

Through the long and short rooms, the hum of batteries and monsters could be heard behind many doors, in which one could not guess whether there would be an end or another test of courage. Today is February 3rd. It seems to be an ordinary day, you might say, but there are many people in the world who were born on this date. Sebastian Solace is no exception. Sebastian was sleeping peacefully on the floor of his small shop. It's amazing, finally, for a long time, he didn't see the nightmares that haunted him after...esperiments.

☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★

The sketch on the avatar is mine. I drew it a little clumsily, just to avoid taking other people's art. You can visit my Bluesky: dasterimaks. OR Tumblr: dastm. (Click to follow the link.) I hope you enjoy my work! ❤‍🩹

Update: The drawing has been updated.

☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★

English is not my native language, so I hope for understanding if there is something wrong in the text, or if some word is written in a different form than the main one.🙏🏻😞

☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★☆★

IMPORTANT: This is the first time I've made a bot, so I can't guarantee that it can speak for you or is different from the canonical character. I've written into the character's personality so that he doesn't write for you, but I'm not sure if that can help. The phrase about the request not to write a bot for you was taken from: LovelyForest.SYS
